reviews.review_description: It says user not entitled when I try to load it now.
App fixed. This film is great. :)

Though some might find it dull (especially if they have little interest in American history or politics), The People’s House one of the most rewarding experiences I have had so far with my Oculus Go.

Read more of my thoughts here: http://www.oculusgogogo.com/reviews/peoples-house/

On Oculus Go, the video and UI are running at what appears to be half Vsync, or is otherwise stuttering. This is obvious in the very first shot by looking at the clouds above going by. Additionally, there is very serious aliasing artifacts on high contrast parts of the video, like hard edges between different coloured furniture and detailed carpets.

Hope the team gives these issues in a future update; in the meantime, I suggest Go owners hold off from downloading this experience.
Really good. Awesome alternative if you have not been able to visit the White House

Beautiful experience, excellent level of presence for a good quality video on Oculus Go. These are the real experiences VR film, 360 3D. I hope in the future 6dof video. Felix & Paul Studios is a guarantee. ps.This video used John Carmack new 5K technique?
I miss you, Obama! Great tour of the White House and a couple personal feeling sit downs with the former President and First Lady.

I do NOT like it when they HIDE the true file size. Come on, guys...
Can we get a break? Tell us the REAL requirements, okay? Thanks. 

I'll update my review when I have enough room to actually LOAD it.
Amazing tour of the White House
